_comment: ElevenLabs ConvAI webhook tool schema for check_availability. Ported from elevenlabs.js:checkAvailabilityTool(). The runtime assembler (stamp.py) substitutes {{webhook_base_url}} and {{client_slug}} before uploading via POST /v1/convai/tools.
name: {{client_slug}}__check_availability
description: Check available appointment slots in the business calendar for a given date or date range. Call this when the caller wants to know when they can come in or asks about specific times. Always check availability before attempting to book.

date_range_start.description: Start of the window to check, in the business timezone. Use ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) or a natural phrase like 'tomorrow' or 'next Tuesday'.

date_range_end.description: Optional end of the window. Defaults to 3 business days after start. Use ISO date or a natural phrase.

specific_time.description: Optional specific time of day the caller asked about, e.g. '10am' or '2:30pm'. When present, the tool will answer whether that time is open rather than listing all slots.

_response_contract.available: boolean — true if any slots exist in the requested window
_response_contract.date: string — resolved ISO date that was checked

slots.iso: string — full ISO timestamp of the slot (use this for book_appointment.slot_iso)

_response_contract.message: string — plain-English summary safe to read to caller if available=false
